dependents_of_new_module: 3.4.6 (fixture/live suite) will exercise wiring.py end-to-end against mocked/live client
risk_areas: entity.idx / edge-write RPCs do not exist in the real engine -- SegmentWiringClient.lookup_entity_files/index_entity/put_edge are Protocol-only, no real gRPC-backed implementation possible in this commit

PutSegment's real request shape has no path field -- new_topic_path cannot be registered anywhere queryable by the engine today (pre-existing gap in already-committed engine/rpc/server.go, not fixed here)
target_topic -> file_id resolution requires a caller-supplied resolver since PutSegmentRequest takes file_id not path
regression_surface: purely additive; agents/ingestion/segment.py, shortlist.py, dispatch.py, rawdoc.py, normalize_*.py all untouched
